data:
principle,principle number,section,How to Win Friends and Influence People
"Don't criticize, condemn, or complain.",1,Techniques in Handling People,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Give honest and sincere appreciation.,2,Techniques in Handling People,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Arouse in the other person an eager want.,3,Techniques in Handling People,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Become genuinely interested in other people.,1,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Smile.,2,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Remember that a person's name is to that person the sweetest and most important sound in any language.,3,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Be a good listener. Encourage others to talk about themselves.,4,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Talk in terms of the other person's interests.,5,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Make the other person feel important - and do it sincerely.,6,Six Ways to Make People Like You,How to Win Friends and Influence People
The only way to get the best out of an argument is to avoid it.,1,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
"Show respect for the other person's opinions. Never say, ""You're wrong.""",2,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
"If you are wrong, admit it quickly and emphatically.",3,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Begin in a friendly way.,4,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
"Get the other person saying ""yes, yes"" immediately.",5,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Let the other person do a great deal of the talking.,6,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Let the other person feel that the idea is his or hers.,7,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Try honestly to see things from the other person's point of view.,8,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Be sympathetic to the other person's ideas and desires.,9,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Appeal to the nobler motives.,10,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Dramatize your ideas.,11,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Throw down a challenge.,12,Win People to Your Way of Thinking,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Begin with praise and honest appreciation.,1,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Call attention to people's mistakes indirectly.,2,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Talk about your own mistakes before criticizing the other person.,3,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Ask questions instead of giving direct orders.,4,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Let the other person save face.,5,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
"Praise the slightest improvement and praise every improvement. Be ""hearty in your approbation and lavish in your praise.""",6,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Give the other person a fine reputation to live up to.,7,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Use encouragement. Make the fault seem easy to correct.,8,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
Make the other person happy about doing the thing you suggest.,9,Be a Leader: How to Change People Without Giving Offense or Arousing Resentment,How to Win Friends and Influence People
